case_number: constitutional petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-193 of 2018 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 10.03.2022. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. Mr. Rafique Ahmed K. Abro, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A.G. --------------------- At the very outset, it is stated by learned Counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of this petition before this Court on merits, provided Assistant Commissioner, Bakrani is directed to dispose of the application of the petitioner in accordance with law within sixty days, which is not opposed by learned Addl.A.G Sindh. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition is dismissed as not pressed with direction to Assistant Commissioner, Bakrani to dispose of application of the petitioner in accordance with law within sixty days, hereinafter, if it is pending with him. JUDGE JUDGE
